data.title: Agent incorrectly interprets review workflow as allowing commit with failing review after tier exhaustion
data.description: During sprint for dafa-b1fe, orchestrator agent misinterpreted escalation exhaustion as permission to commit with a failed review. The review workflow language 'proceed to commit' is ambiguous — should mean continue fixing, not bypass the review gate. Pre-commit hook would block it but agent wasted context attempting it. Fix: clarify REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md escalation language.
